understanding.goal_understanding: The goal is to complete all levels of the KA59 puzzle game by placing every selectable piece onto a goal tile simultaneously. Each level has a grid with obstacles, selectable pieces, and one or more goal tiles; a level is won when all goal tiles are occupied by selectable pieces at the same time.
understanding.mechanics_understanding: Movement uses pixel coordinates (3 pixels per cell). Actions MOVE_LEFT/RIGHT/UP/DOWN shift the currently selected piece, possibly pushing adjacent pushable blocks. Some objects are walls that block movement. CLICK action with a target_position in pixel coordinates switches control to another selectable piece at that position; if no selectable is there or the action is blocked, the selection does not change. The semantic_grid provides a compact cell-level view with symbols: P=selected, S=other selectable, B=block, #=wall, +=goal, .=empty. Step budget is limited per level, and running out of steps ends the run without winning.

Agent explained goal and mechanics.

understanding.goal_understanding: The goal is to complete all levels of the KA59 puzzle game by placing every selectable piece onto a goal tile simultaneously. Each level has a grid with obstacles, selectable pieces, and one or more goal tiles; a level is won when all goal tiles are occupied by selectable pieces at the same time.
understanding.mechanics_understanding: Movement uses pixel coordinates (3 pixels per cell). Actions MOVE_LEFT/RIGHT/UP/DOWN shift the currently selected piece, possibly pushing adjacent pushable blocks. Some objects are walls that block movement. CLICK action with a target_position in pixel coordinates switches control to another selectable piece at that position; if no selectable is there or the action is blocked, the selection does not change. The semantic_grid provides a compact cell-level view with symbols: P=selected, S=other selectable, B=block, #=wall, +=goal, .=empty. Step budget is limited per level, and running out of steps ends the run without winning.
